title: King of Wakanda
body:
# **How to get powers**

You need to find Heart-shaped herb

![Heart-Shaped Herb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680e5bd42b690f96b0f888ffb894c87cc0f53669.png)

Then craft potion from it and get power of the black panther!

![Herb Potion Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd5f54408005a4dde0f7a77d7750ac5719afebec.png)

## Now you have powers but something is missing.

Craft necklace to get your suit

![Necklace Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b29f9c63bdc43ebd7b059c31ead6ff00fe4b2f45.png)

Now you completely become Black Panther

![Black Panther](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47961008d3a6ac7bb9bcd3b2e380ff8a6e6d33e7.png)

_Black Panther suit texture - [Heroes Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/heroesexpansion)_
